# Scoring Zone

> Golf short game practice app that turns putting, chipping, and pitching into scored challenges benchmarked against your handicap. Free during early access.

## What Is Scoring Zone?

Scoring Zone is a Progressive Web App (PWA) for golf short game practice. It gives golfers structured, scored drills for putting, chipping, and pitching — with performance benchmarks, XP progression, and analytics. Built by Stephen Pickering, a competitive amateur golfer who played high-level golf across Ireland from his early teens into his late twenties.

## Core Features

- **Putting Drills** — 20+ scored putting challenges including Ladder Putting, Gate Drill, 3-2-1 Pressure Test, Five-Foot Circle, and 100-Putt Challenge
- **Chipping & Wedge Drills** — Scored chipping challenges from greenside positions with proximity tracking and Up & Down percentage
- **Practice Assistant** — Structured session builder with clock wedge distance calculator, practice notes, session timer, and pre-round warm-up routine
- **Round Stats** — Track rounds, analyse short game performance, and identify where strokes are being lost
- **SIM Lab** — Pressure tests that simulate tournament conditions with timed drills, elimination rounds, and streak requirements
- **Elite Mode** — Tour-level analytics including strokes gained around the green, trend data, and benchmarks against PGA Tour averages
- **Performance Hub** — Generates a separate Short Game Handicap and Putting Handicap based on drill performance
- **XP Progression** — Features unlock progressively as you earn XP by completing drills

## Who It's For

- Golfers trying to break 100, 90, 80, or scratch
- Beginners who want structured, measurable practice
- High handicappers focused on scoring improvement from 100 yards in
- Junior golfers learning the short game
- Senior golfers maximising their scoring ability
- Competitive golfers training under pressure
- PGA teaching professionals (Founders Programme launched March 2026)

## Key Statistics

- 60%+ of amateur golf strokes come from within 100 yards
- Only 25% of registered golfers break 90 consistently
- A 20-handicapper who improves up-and-down conversion from 15% to 30% saves ~2 strokes per round
- The average amateur three-putts 4-5 times per round — tour pros average less than 1

## Pricing

Free during early access — all features unlocked, no credit card required. App Store launch planned for 2026.

## Technical

- PWA — save to phone, works like a native app on iOS and Android
- No app store download required during early access
- Works offline after initial load

## Founder

Stephen Pickering — played competitive amateur golf across Ireland, built Scoring Zone as a solo founder to solve the gap in structured short game practice tools.

## How Scoring Zone Differs from Other Golf Apps

Most golf apps focus on GPS distances, scorecards, and full-swing analytics. Scoring Zone is built entirely for short game practice — the part of golf that accounts for 60%+ of strokes but gets the least structured attention. Every drill is scored with specific targets, all benchmarked against handicap level.
